AVOneTool 0.2.9+1d45f59fd2fbaa16e3e2f39878b32308fabf2267
Copyright (c) 2023 Weloveloli
USAGE:
Download video to d:/download from missav.:
  avonetool download --output d:/download --web-url https://missav.com/cus-1468

  -o, --output          Set output directory.

  -w, --web-url         (: target) Url of website to extract media.

  -t, --thread-count    (Default: 4) Set download thread count.

  -n, --save-name       Set output filename.

  -r, --retry-count     The number of retries when download segment error.

  --data-dir            Path to use for the data folder (database files, etc.).

  --ffmpeg              Path to external FFmpeg executable to use in place of
                        default found in PATH.

  --proxy               proxy for example http://127.0.0.1:8000

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

AVOneTool 0.2.9+1d45f59fd2fbaa16e3e2f39878b32308fabf2267
Copyright (c) 2023 Weloveloli
USAGE:
Add plugin repository.:
  avonetool plugin-repo --add-repo "AVOne MetaTube"
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/weloveloli/AVOne.Plugins.Metatube/dist/manif
  est.json
Show all plugins in plugin repository.:
  avonetool plugin-repo --show-packages
Show plugin repository list.:
  avonetool plugin-repo --list

  -l, --list             (: action) Show plugin repository list.

  -s, --show-packages    (: action) Show all plugins in plugin repository.

  -a, --add-repo         (: action) Add plugin repository.

  --data-dir             Path to use for the data folder (database files, etc.).

  --ffmpeg               Path to external FFmpeg executable to use in place of
                         default found in PATH.

  --proxy                proxy for example http://127.0.0.1:8000

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.

result.stderr:
AVOneTool 0.2.9+1d45f59fd2fbaa16e3e2f39878b32308fabf2267
Copyright (c) 2023 Weloveloli
USAGE:
Scan all the mp4 file start with fc under the folder d:/movie/ and print their
metadata.:
  avonetool scan --dir d:/movie/ --search-pattern fc*.mp4
Scan metadata of d:/movie/abc.mp4 and move the file to d:/jav.:
  avonetool scan --file d:/movie/abc.mp4 --save-metadata --target-folder d:/jav
Scan all the mp4 file start with fc under the folder d:/jav and move them to
d:/movie/.:
  avonetool scan --container --dir d:/movie/ --search-pattern fc*.mp4
  --save-metadata --target-folder d:/jav

  -s, --save-metadata     Save metadata or not.

  -t, --target-folder     Path to target folder to move.

  -c, --container         If use create a new folder shares same name with media
                          file in the target to hold all the media, image, nfo
                          files.

  -d, --dir               (: target) Path of directory to be scanned.

  -p, --search-pattern    The search string to match against the names of files
                          in path.

  -f, --file              (: target) Path of file to be scanned.

  -n, --provider-name     ProviderName

  -i, --provider-id       ProviderId

  --data-dir              Path to use for the data folder (database files,
                          etc.).

  --ffmpeg                Path to external FFmpeg executable to use in place of
                          default found in PATH.

  --proxy                 proxy for example http://127.0.0.1:8000

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
